summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Order Operations and Production Queue features for Konekt Business OS. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend integration verified with all UI elements functional and workflows working correctly.

order_operations_api.list_orders: PASS - GET /api/admin/orders-ops returns list of orders (5 found)
order_operations_api.get_single_order: PASS - GET /api/admin/orders-ops/{id} returns order details with status history
order_operations_api.get_nonexistent_order: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid order ID
order_operations_api.update_order_status: PASS - PATCH /api/admin/orders-ops/{id}/status updates status and adds to history

inventory_reservation_api.reserve_inventory_success: PASS - POST /api/admin/orders-ops/reserve-inventory reserves inventory for order

assign_task_api.assign_task_success: PASS - POST /api/admin/orders-ops/assign-task creates task linked to order

send_to_production_api.send_to_production_success: PASS - POST /api/admin/orders-ops/send-to-production adds order to queue
send_to_production_api.duplicate_prevention: PASS - Returns 400 if order already in production queue

production_queue_api.list_queue: PASS - GET /api/admin/production/queue returns all production items (2 found)
production_queue_api.list_queue_filtered: PASS - Filter by status works correctly
production_queue_api.update_production_status: PASS - PATCH /api/admin/production/queue/{id}/status updates status and syncs to order
production_queue_api.status_sync_to_order: PASS - Production status changes reflect in linked order status
production_queue_api.update_invalid_id: PASS - Returns 404 for non-existent production item

full_workflow_test.complete_workflow: PASS - List orders → Update status → Send to production → Update production status → Verify order sync

frontend_orders_ops_page.orders_list: PASS - Displays 5 order cards with order number, customer, amount, status
frontend_orders_ops_page.order_selection: PASS - Clicking order card shows Order Actions panel
frontend_orders_ops_page.status_update: PASS - Status dropdown updates order status
frontend_orders_ops_page.reserve_inventory_form: PASS - SKU input, quantity input, Reserve Stock button present
frontend_orders_ops_page.assign_task_form: PASS - Task title, description, assigned to, department, due date, priority fields
frontend_orders_ops_page.send_to_production_form: PASS - Production type, assigned to, priority, due date, notes fields
frontend_orders_ops_page.convert_to_invoice_button: PASS - Convert to Invoice button present
frontend_orders_ops_page.status_history_display: PASS - Status history shown for selected order
frontend_orders_ops_page.inventory_reserved_badge: PASS - Shows 'Inventory Reserved' badge on orders with reservations

frontend_production_queue_page.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Total Jobs, Queued, In Progress, Completed, Blocked counts
frontend_production_queue_page.kanban_columns: PASS - 7 columns displayed (queued, assigned, in_progress, waiting_approval, quality_check, completed, blocked)
frontend_production_queue_page.production_cards: PASS - Cards show order number, customer, production type, assigned to, priority, due date
frontend_production_queue_page.status_dropdown: PASS - Each card has status dropdown for quick status changes
frontend_production_queue_page.status_filter: PASS - Filter dropdown filters production items by status
frontend_production_queue_page.detailed_view: PASS - Detailed View section shows expanded card info with history
frontend_production_queue_page.history_tracking: PASS - History section shows status change timeline

seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing: Tasks linked to orders (TEST Task prefix), production queue items (ORD-TEST, ORD-WORKFLOW prefixes). Inventory reservations created for existing SKUs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order Operations (orders-ops) and Production Queue APIs are fully functional. Document send routes (/api/admin/send/*) are MOCKED email stubs. Test data exists: 5 orders, 2 production queue items. Status sync between production queue and orders works correctly.

mocked_apis_list: POST /api/admin/send/quote/{id} - Returns stub success, no actual email sent
POST /api/admin/send/invoice/{id} - Returns stub success, no actual email sent
POST /api/admin/send/order/{id}/confirmation - Returns stub success, no actual email sent

features_verified: Order Operations - GET /api/admin/orders-ops lists all orders
Order Operations - GET /api/admin/orders-ops/{id} gets single order
Order Operations - PATCH /api/admin/orders-ops/{id}/status updates order status with history
Order Operations - POST /api/admin/orders-ops/reserve-inventory reserves inventory for order
Order Operations - POST /api/admin/orders-ops/assign-task creates task linked to order
Order Operations - POST /api/admin/orders-ops/send-to-production adds order to production queue
Production Queue - GET /api/admin/production/queue lists production items
Production Queue - GET /api/admin/production/stats returns queue statistics
Production Queue - PATCH /api/admin/production/queue/{id}/status updates production status and syncs to order
Document Send - POST /api/admin/send/quote/{id} triggers quote send (MOCKED)
Document Send - POST /api/admin/send/invoice/{id} triggers invoice send (MOCKED)
Frontend OrdersPageOps - Order list, status update, reserve inventory, assign task, send to production
Frontend ProductionQueuePage - Kanban board, status updates, stats display, history tracking
